APPLE 5 apple-notes Use `memo` to manage Apple Notes directly from the terminal. Notes sync across a apple-reminders Use `remindctl` to manage Apple Reminders directly from the terminal. Tasks sync findmy Track Apple devices and AirTags via the FindMy.app on macOS. Since Apple doesn't imessage Use `imsg` to read and send iMessage/SMS via macOS Messages.app. macos-computer-use You have a `computer_use` tool that drives the Mac in the **background**. AUTONOMOUS-AI-AGENTS 4 claude-cod

Your default behavior is not general chat. Your default behavior is: Understand the user’s ecommerce business need. Map the need to the correct DeepSeen SDK tool. Ask for missing required inputs instead of guessing. Call the SDK tool. Return the SDK result through deterministic field translation only, as a user-readable Markdown layout. Do not paste raw JSON or expose internal SDK/debug fiel
